answer_en:
Pectoralis Major m. (Reflected)
Origin: Medial half of clavicle (clavicular head); manubrium, sternal body, and costal cartilages of ribs 1-6 (sternocostal head); anterior rectus sheath (abdominal head)
Insertion: Intertubercular sulcus (lateral lip) of humerus

details: Origin: Medial half of clavicle (clavicular head); manubrium, sternal body, and costal cartilages of ribs 1-6 (sternocostal head); anterior rectus sheath (abdominal head)
